author: Pixar YouTube
text:
Toy Story 5: Making "Atlas" with Pixar Artist Ricardo Pacheco
Pixar Character Shading Artist Ricardo Pacheco walks us through Pixar's process for bringing a character like "Atlas" to life for Toy Story 5! See Toy Story 5, now in theaters! 

#animation #pixar #disney #disneyplus #hoppers #film #movies #bts #behindthescenes #3d #shading #texturing #toystory #toystory5 #ts5

author: Pixar YouTube
text:
Toy Story 5 Cast at Pixar! | The Pixar Show TS5 Special Edition
Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusak, and Greta Lee visit Pixar to join Pixar Show hosts Cody & Kayla on The Pixar Show! What songs are on Woody's playlist? What's their favorite Toy Story era? How many Buzzes are too many Buzzes?! Find out on this special edition of THE PIXAR SHOW!
